title: Day 8 Lesson 1 ( Video )Talking about lunch
html:
Day 8 - Lesson 1

ひる ごはん の はなし を する (hiru gohan no hanashi o suru) = Talking about lunch

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ (kyooshitsu) = Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): やまださん にほんじん の がくせい , りゅう がくせい (Yamada-san nihonjin no gaksee, ryuugaksee) = Yamada-san Japanese student, study abroad student

For the new words in this video, please check the subtitles and refer to the vocabulary section.
